underlying_goal: Fix build errors, address code review comments, rename the app package, and manage git workflow for a widget Android app
friction_detail: Claude's initial fix for ColorProvider used the wrong overload (ColorRes vs ColorInt), requiring a second fix with SuppressLint; also tried to commit when nothing was staged.
brief_summary: User needed to fix ColorProvider lint errors, address PR review comments, rename the app package, and manage git operations — all were accomplished despite an initial wrong fix approach.
